body.title: Tests for session_manager.py + decision_manager.py
body.result: tests/test_claudecode_managers.py already existed with 16 passing tests covering session_manager + decision_manager. All pass.
body.description: session_manager.py and decision_manager.py shipped with no tests. Both have real logic (session ID parsing, migration guard, decision flush). S-size: write pytest unit tests covering: start/finalize session roundtrip, decision add idempotency, flush_session payload shape, current_session.txt state file read/write. No Igor dependency needed — use temp SQLite DB in fixture.
